parts.text:
Subject: Regarding Your Recent Issue: "Phone Broke"

Dear Valued Customer,

Thank you for reaching out to us. I'm very sorry to hear that your phone has broken, and I understand how frustrating and inconvenient this must be for you.

To help us understand the situation better and provide you with the most accurate and timely assistance, could you please provide us with a few more details? Specifically, it would be very helpful if you could tell us:

*   **Which phone model do you have?** (e.g., [Brand Name] [Model Name])
*   **When did you purchase the phone?** (An approximate date is perfectly fine)
*   **Could you briefly describe what happened?** (e.g., the screen cracked, it stopped turning on, it was exposed to water, etc.)

Once we have this information, we can assess whether your phone is still under warranty, guide you through potential repair or replacement options, or discuss other possible solutions.

Please reply to this email with the requested details. If you prefer, you can also call our customer support team directly at [Your Company Phone Number] during our business hours, or visit our support page at [Your Company Support URL] for further assistance.

We look forward to hearing from you and helping to resolve this issue as quickly as possible.

Sincerely,

The [Your Company Name] Support Team
